'''jolazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zoidogamous|zoidogamous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-l-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zoidogamous|zoidogamous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jolazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jolazithi|jolazithi]] || [[word:jolaziji|jolaziji]] || [[word:jolazishi|jolazishi]] || [[word:jolaziki|jolaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jolazuthuthu|jolazuthuthu]] || [[word:jolazujuju|jolazujuju]] || [[word:jolazushushu|jolazushushu]] || [[word:jolazukuku|jolazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jolazuthu|jolazuthu]] || [[word:jolazuju|jolazuju]] || [[word:jolazushu|jolazushu]] || [[word:jolazuku|jolazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jolazufthuf|jolazufthuf]] || [[word:jolazufjuf|jolazufjuf]] || [[word:jolazufshuf|jolazufshuf]] || [[word:jolazufkuf|jolazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jolazethe|jolazethe]] || [[word:jolazeje|jolazeje]] || [[word:jolazeshe|jolazeshe]] || [[word:jolazeke|jolazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jolazothotho|jolazothotho]] || [[word:jolazojojo|jolazojojo]] || [[word:jolazoshosho|jolazoshosho]] || [[word:jolazokoko|jolazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jolazotho|jolazotho]] || [[word:jolazojo|jolazojo]] || [[word:jolazosho|jolazosho]] || [[word:jolazoko|jolazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jolazofthof|jolazofthof]] || [[word:jolazofjof|jolazofjof]] || [[word:jolazofshof|jolazofshof]] || [[word:jolazofkof|jolazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jolazĂŻfthĂŻf|jolazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jolazĂŻfjĂŻf|jolazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jolazĂŻfshĂŻf|jolazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jolazĂŻfkĂŻf|jolazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jolazĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|jolazĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jolazĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|jolazĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jolazĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|jolazĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jolazĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|jolazĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jolazĂŻfthĂŻf|jolazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jolazĂŻfjĂŻf|jolazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jolazĂŻfshĂŻf|jolazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jolazĂŻfkĂŻf|jolazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jolazĂŻfthĂŻf|jolazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jolazĂŻfjĂŻf|jolazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jolazĂŻfshĂŻf|jolazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jolazĂŻfkĂŻf|jolazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jolazĂŠthĂŠ|jolazĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:jolazĂŠjĂŠ|jolazĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:jolazĂŠshĂŠ|jolazĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:jolazĂŠkĂŠ|jolazĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jolazathatha|jolazathatha]] || [[word:jolazajaja|jolazajaja]] || [[word:jolazashasha|jolazashasha]] || [[word:jolazakaka|jolazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jolazatha|jolazatha]] || [[word:jolazaja|jolazaja]] || [[word:jolazasha|jolazasha]] || [[word:jolazaka|jolazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jolazafthaf|jolazafthaf]] || [[word:jolazafjaf|jolazafjaf]] || [[word:jolazafshaf|jolazafshaf]] || [[word:jolazafkaf|jolazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jolazasha|jolazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jolazshĂ«sha|jolazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jolazrosha|jolazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jolazmusha|jolazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jolazyasha|jolazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojolaznkshĂ«sha|gojolaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojolaznkrosha|gojolaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojolaznkmusha|gojolaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojolaznkyasha|gojolaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jolalazasha|jolalazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jolalazshĂ«sha|jolalazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jolalazrosha|jolalazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jolalazmusha|jolalazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jolalazyasha|jolalazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojolalaznkshĂ«sha|gojolalaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojolalaznkrosha|gojolalaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojolalaznkmusha|gojolalaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojolalaznkyasha|gojolalaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jelĂŠzasha|jelĂŠzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jelĂŠzshĂ«sha|jelĂŠzshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jelĂŠzrosha|jelĂŠzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jelĂŠzmusha|jelĂŠzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jelĂŠzyasha|jelĂŠzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojelĂŠznkshĂ«sha|gojelĂŠznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojelĂŠznkrosha|gojelĂŠznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojelĂŠznkmusha|gojelĂŠznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojelĂŠznkyasha|gojelĂŠznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jolfazasha|jolfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jolfazshĂ«sha|jolfazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jolfazrosha|jolfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jolfazmusha|jolfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jolfazyasha|jolfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojolfaznkshĂ«sha|gojolfaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojolfaznkrosha|gojolfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojolfaznkmusha|gojolfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojolfaznkyasha|gojolfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|59e8839}}
